headline: Why The Narrative Around Southwest Airlines (LUV) Is Shifting With Fuel Risks And New Initiatives
summary: Southwest Airlines' fair value estimate has been adjusted slightly higher to about US$45.25 from US$44.82, giving you an updated reference point for where some analysts think the stock now stands. That change sits against a mixed backdrop of research, with some firms citing potential earnings support from new product initiatives and others flagging fuel risk and softer guidance as reasons for restraint. Read on to see how this evolving narrative could shape your view and what to watch as new...
